titleStmt.title: SII 39.29: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 29. (A.R. No. 29 of 1916.) SAṈṈAVAṈAM, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SĀLYAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL [MĀ]ṞAVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN-KULAŚĒKHARADĒVA-[8] YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription records the sale of land to the temple by the ūrār of Ilañjēri near Poyil in Kiḻkuṇḍāṟu, a subdivision of Kēralasiṅga-vaḷanāḍu, and donated it to the temple for burning lamp. While mentioning the boundaries, a person named Chaiyarayaṉ-Paṟaiyan of Adaḷaiyūr nāḍu is also mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmaṟkirttikku me[l śrīmā]ṟpaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulacekara tevaṟku yāṇṭu 8vatu mār
kaḻi mātam tiruttiyūr muṭṭattut tirucaṉṉavaṉattu Uṭaiyār tiruccaṉṉavaṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār śrī koyil ca
ṇṭeśvaratevaṟku keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu kīḻkuṇṭāṟṟu poyiṟpāl Illañceri Ūrāyamaiñca
ṟṟu kuṭutta nilamāvatu ciṟu kaṭampaṉ kuḷattu melaimaṭaiyāl nirpāñcu Uḻa
mūṉṟukku Āvatu kiḻ pāṟkellai teṟku nokkip poṉa vatikku
meṟku llai nāṟpatteṉṉāyirava pūṉ toṭṭattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai vāriyaṉ ṉ makkaḷ koḻuvaṉ ceyk kīḻ
varampukkum Atalaiyūr nāṭṭu caiyaraiyaṉ paṟaiyaṉ ceykkiḻava kum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai Ata
ṭu vicaiyaraiyaṉ Ūruṇit teṉkarai maṇ puraḷikkut teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉ kellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nila
til meṉokkiya maramuṅ kiṉokkiya kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Emmilicaiñca vilaiy
vilaikku ṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu Emmilicaiñca vilaipporuḷ Āvaṇakkaḷatte kāṭṭi Eṟṟip perumāḷ �
pakkale kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Innilattukku Ituveyvilaiyu Olaiyum poruḷ celave
vallatu veṟu vilai māvaṟutip poruḷ celavolai kāṇavuṅ kāṭṭavuṅ kaṭavatallavākavu Innilam po peṟṟāṉ
p pokiṟa tiruviḷakkukku tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka candrādittavat Iṟaiyili kārāṇmaiyāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttom In
paṭikku kalliluñ cempilum tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka candrātittavat Iṟai �rāṇmai Āka viṟṟapaṭikku Eḻut
ṭṭik koḷvatākavum yippaṭi cammatittu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruccaṉṉavaṉamu�
yanār śrī ko ṭaśvaratevaṟku yillañceri Ūrāyamaiñca Ūrom yippaṭikku kariyāṉ
ṉ Aiya taṟkuṟiyum t tevappiḷḷai Eḻuttu yippaṭikku muvaṉampi Eḻuttu I
kku koṟṟaṉ comaṉ taṟku ri cakkaṉ Eḻuttu Ūrār colla Inta vilaippiramāṇam Eḻuti �
Ūrkkaṇakku poyyiluṭaiyāṉ Iḷaiyaperumāḷ Eṭuttakai Aḻakiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.29 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
